Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All basic metabolic and glycemic parameters are within normal limits. Lipid profile shows elevated total cholesterol and LDL, and low HDL, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Renal function and urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio are normal. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring cardiovascular risk factors.
